name: Tabouli#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Freshly ground pepper.
2. Soak the wheat in warm water for 20 minutes. Drain thoroughly and squeeze dry.
3. Add the onion, parsley, and half of the olives (quartered) to the drained wheat.
4. Beat together the oil and lemon juice, then season to taste.
5. Mix everything into the wheat.
6. Place the mixture in a flat serving dish and top with quartered tomatoes and the remaining olives cut into halves.
7. Mint may also be added to this dish, either instead of parsley or as well as.
